task: Rename/package/install surfaces to datalox-trajectory-mcp and reduce product-facing MCP tool noise.
summary: Renamed package/install identity to datalox-trajectory-mcp and split lean trajectory MCP from explicit legacy full pack MCP.
observations: Changed package.json/package-lock name to datalox-trajectory-mcp and added datalox-trajectory-mcp plus datalox-pack-mcp bin entries.
Added a lean src/mcp/trajectoryServer.ts used by bin/datalox-mcp.js; it exposes only record_trajectory and export_trajectories.
Kept the full legacy MCP as src/mcp/server.ts and bin/datalox-pack-mcp.js for maintenance/adoption/capture/lint/promotion tools.
Refactored shared MCP registration into src/mcp/sharedServer.ts and made loop_pulse suppress unavailable legacy tool recommendations on the lean server.
Updated install/cache scripts, docs, host instruction surfaces, and tests around the new datalox-trajectory-mcp identity.
Viewer and reviewer workers passed; reviewer re-check passed after the loop_pulse follow-up.
title: Renamed package/install identity to datalox-trajectory-mcp and split lean trajectory MCP from explicit legacy full pack…
signal: Changed package.json/package-lock name to datalox-trajectory-mcp and added datalox-trajectory-mcp plus datalox-pack-mcp bin entries.
recommendedAction: Use datalox-mcp for product-facing trajectory capture/export and reserve datalox-pack-mcp for explicit legacy pack maintenance.
